name: Hearty Vegetable and Pork Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Macaroni, uncooked OR other small pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. In a non-stick saucepan over medium heat, cook pork, onion, and garlic until the meat begins to brown.
2. Drain off any drippings.
3. Add broth, tomato, celery, carrot, Worcestershire sauce, thyme, oregano, and black pepper.
4. Bring to a boil for 1 minute.
5. Add pasta and reduce heat.
6. Simmer for 15 to 20 minutes or until vegetables and pasta are tender.
7. Serve with crusty whole wheat rolls.
